title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six power phrases for prompting Claude Code to accelerate development workflows. The techniques draw from practices used by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, with emphasis on structuring projects, scaling processes, and avoiding common mistakes in AI-assisted coding.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six power phrases for prompting Claude Code, aimed at speeding up development workflows. The techniques draw on practices attributed to Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, covering how to structure projects, scale processes, and avoid common mistakes in AI-assisted coding. The framing connects these phrases to agentic workflows and test-time compute.
